approvalSource: Steve approved continuing the Foundation-only sprint and explicitly approved WEB-GODMODE-001 as the next governed extractor kernel after old-system gold capture, deep auditor repair, and operator pulse closeout.
notes: Approval is for a governed synthetic kernel/proof only. It does not approve live browser login, private/auth/paid source access, broad crawl, external writes, Drive permission mutation, credential mutation, screenshot byte storage, model calls, video/audio download, transcription, or downstream content writes.
boundaries: Blockers block unsafe actions, not the whole sprint.
No external writes, sends, credential mutation, or Drive permission mutation.
No automatic backlog/atom/KB/synthesis/action-route/vector writes from extracted content.
